items.name: Schnitzel
items.description: Delicious Pork or Chicken Breast Schnitzel served with side dishes of your choice and our homemade gravy
items.simplified_description: Breaded pork or chicken breast served with sides and gravy.

items.name: Cabbage Rolls
items.description: Cabbage leaves stuffed with seasoned beef, rice and veggies and baked in a delicious tomato sauce. Served with perogies, sausage, sour cream and caramelized onions
items.simplified_description: Stuffed cabbage rolls with beef, rice, veggies, served with perogies and sausage.

items.name: Roast Beef
items.description: Perfect browned crust on the outside, and tender, moist, and juicy locked inside. It is well-seasoned and packed with flavor
items.simplified_description: Well-seasoned roast beef with a browned crust and juicy interior.

items.name: Big Breakfast
items.description: Two eggs, ham, sausages, bacon, served with hash browns, white or whole grain toast
items.simplified_description: Two eggs with ham, sausages, bacon, hash browns, and toast.

items.name: Clubhouse
items.description: Tomato, bacon, lettuce, mayo, cheese, turkey, white or whole grain toast
items.simplified_description: Sandwich with tomato, bacon, lettuce, mayo, cheese, turkey, and toast.

items.name: Satay Pho
items.description: Phở or pho is a Vietnamese soup dish consisting of broth, rice noodles, herbs, and meat.   Your choice : Rare beef or Beef balls or Half and half
items.simplified_description: Vietnamese soup with broth, rice noodles, herbs, and choice of beef meat.

items.name: Vermicelli Bowls
items.description: This simple vermicelli noodle salad combines fresh herbs, rice vermicelli, cucumber, bean sprouts, and meat.   Your choice : Satay beef or Satay chicken or Half and half
items.simplified_description: Vermicelli noodle salad with herbs, cucumber, sprouts, and choice of satay meat.

items.name: Pho Noodle Soup
items.description: Phở or pho is a Vietnamese soup dish consisting of broth, rice noodles, herbs, and meat.  Your choice : Rare beef or Beef balls or Half and half
items.simplified_description: Vietnamese soup with broth, rice noodles, herbs, and choice of beef meat.

items.name: Vietnamese Sub
items.description: Banh Mi is a Vietnamese sandwich that’s made up of crusty bread rolls smeared with pate, mayo, pickled vegetables, green onion, cilantro,fresh chillies
items.simplified_description: Vietnamese sandwich with pate, mayo, pickled veggies, herbs, and fresh chilies.

items.name: Stir-Fried Noodle
items.description: Stir-Fried Egg Noodle with Broccoli, Carrots, Celery, White Onion, House Special Sauce with Your Choice of Chicken, Beef or Prawns
items.simplified_description: Egg noodles stir-fried with vegetables and choice of chicken, beef, or prawns.
